Operation 'simple' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. data.current_description: Query a specific data category in the ONYPHE database.
data.summary_suggestion: Search ONYPHE database by category and query
data.description_suggestion: Performs a simple category-based search of the ONYPHE database. Accepts a category parameter (e.g., IP, domain, certificate) and a query string to search within that category. Returns matching results from the Attack Surface Discovery database. Useful for straightforward lookups without complex filtering.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Simple category query' is too generic and doesn't indicate the search action. Description lacks clarity about what categories are supported, what the query parameter expects, and what results are returned. message: Operation 'simpleBest' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary 'Simple best category query' is vague about what 'best' means. Description uses unclear terminology ('best/most recent') without clarifying the selection criteria. Enhanced version clarifies that 'best' means most recent or highest-quality, specifies input parameters and their expected format, explains the single-result output, and provides context about when an AI agent should use this operation versus the standard simple search.

data.current_description: Query a specific data category and return only the best/most recent result.
data.summary_suggestion: Search category and return most recent result
data.description_suggestion: Performs a category-based search of the ONYPHE database and returns only the most recent or highest-quality result. Accepts a category parameter (e.g., IP, domain, certificate) and a query string. Returns a single result object representing the best match. Useful when only the latest or most relevant data point is needed, reducing response size and processing overhead.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Simple best category query' is vague about what 'best' means. Description uses unclear terminology ('best/most recent') without clarifying the selection criteria. Enhanced version clarifies that 'best' means most recent or highest-quality, specifies input parameters and their expected format, explains the single-result output, and provides context about when an AI agent should use this operation versus the standard simple search.

message: Operation 'search' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Current description lacks detail about inputs (query parameter, pagination options) and outputs (SearchResponse structure, pagination). Added specificity about what the search discovers (attack surface data), expected parameters, and response structure to improve AI agent interpretability for determining when to use this operation and how to process results.

data.current_description: Search the ONYPHE database using the ONYPHE Query Language (OQL).
data.description_suggestion: Search the ONYPHE database using the ONYPHE Query Language (OQL) to discover attack surface data. Accepts a query parameter containing OQL syntax and optional pagination parameters. Returns a SearchResponse object containing matching results with pagination information, allowing AI agents to retrieve and iterate through attack surface intelligence.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks detail about inputs (query parameter, pagination options) and outputs (SearchResponse structure, pagination). Added specificity about what the search discovers (attack surface data), expected parameters, and response structure to improve AI agent interpretability for determining when to use this operation and how to process results.

message: Operation 'export' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Enhanced description specifies parameter requirements, output formats, potential performance considerations, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to invoke this operation versus standard search.

data.current_description: Export search results from the ONYPHE database using OQL. Returns all matching results.
data.description_suggestion: Export all search results from the ONYPHE database using OQL query syntax. Accepts a query parameter with OQL syntax and optional format/pagination parameters. Returns complete result set in specified format (CSV, JSON, or similar). Note: Large result sets may take time to process and export. Useful for bulk data retrieval and external analysis of attack surface discovery results.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about inputs (what parameters are accepted), outputs (what format is returned), and side effects (processing time for large datasets). Enhanced description specifies parameter requirements, output formats, potential performance considerations, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to invoke this operation versus standard search.

message: Operation 'discovery' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, unclear_purpose, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Current summary and description lack specificity about the discovery operation's distinct purpose within ASM. Added context that this is specialized for asset discovery (not general search), clarified inputs/outputs, and explained the distinction from standard search to help AI agents understand when to use discovery versus search operations.

data.current_description: Perform a discovery search on the ONYPHE database.
data.description_suggestion: Perform an attack surface discovery search to identify and enumerate exposed assets and services. Accepts a discovery query parameter and optional filtering/pagination parameters. Returns discovery results including identified assets, services, and exposure details. This operation is specialized for asset discovery workflows within Attack Surface Management (ASM), distinct from general search operations.
data.reasoning: Current summary and description lack specificity about the discovery operation's distinct purpose within ASM. Added context that this is specialized for asset discovery (not general search), clarified inputs/outputs, and explained the distinction from standard search to help AI agents understand when to use discovery versus search operations.

data.current_description: Returns a summarized view of search results.
